hero.title: The Venue
hero.description: Experience ideas worth spreading at ACE Engineering College, Ankushapur, Ghatkesar, Hyderabad.

locations.name: The Auditorium
locations.description: Where the magic happens. A state-of-the-art facility at the Engineering Block featuring perfect acoustics, dynamic lighting, and seating for over 1,200 attendees.

locations.name: Networking Plaza
locations.description: Open-air spaces for coffee and conversation.

transportation.title: Shuttle Bus
transportation.description: Dedicated TEDxACEEC shuttles run every 20 mins from Ghatkesar bus stand starting at 8:00 AM.

transportation.title: Metro / Train
transportation.description: Take the MMTS or local train to Ghatkesar station. The campus is a brief 10-minute auto ride from the station.

transportation.title: Car Parking
transportation.description: Free designated parking for attendees is available at Gate 4. VIP parking available at Gate 1. Navigate to ACE Engineering College, Ankushapur on Google Maps.

address.full: Engineering Block, ACE Engineering College, Ankushapur, Ghatkesar, Telangana 501301
